name: Paula Poundstone
blurb: She performed several HBO specials in the late 1980s and 1990s and became the first woman to win a CableACE Award for a stand-up special and the first female comic to host the White House Correspondents Dinner.
bio: Paula Poundstone is an American stand-up comedian known for her spontaneous, conversational observational comedy and extensive improvised interaction with her audiences. She performed several HBO specials in the late 1980s and 1990s and became the first woman to win a CableACE Award for a stand-up special and the first female comic to host the White House Correspondents Dinner. She is a frequent panelist on NPRs Wait Wait Dont Tell Me.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up in Boston open-mic clubs
Writes and stars in HBO special Cats, Cops and Stuff, winning a CableACE Award
First female comic to host the White House Correspondents Dinner
Launches NPR program Live from the Poundstone Institute

accolades: First woman to win the CableACE Award for Best Stand-Up Comedy Special
First female comic to host the White House Correspondents Dinner
American Comedy Award for Best Female Stand-Up Comic

movies_tv.t: Lois & Clark: The New Adventures of Superman
